summary: Issue #730 PC layout follow-up implemented via TDD. New Tooltip component (100ms delay, dark theme, role=tooltip + aria-hidden=true, wrapper span tabIndex=-1, useEffect cleanup) and new TerminalContainer component (hosts History+Terminal, owns visibility via useHistoryPaneState, HISTORY_PANE_ID moved here). ActivityBar wraps each button in Tooltip and drops native title. WorktreeDesktopLayout simplified to 2-column (ActivityPane + RightPane), MobileLayout dead-code fallback removed. WorktreeDetailRefactored restructured: outer flex hosts full-height ActivityBar + inner column with DesktopHeader/BranchMismatchAlert/WorktreeDesktopLayout(rightPane=TerminalContainer)/NavigationButtons/MessageInput. DEFAULT_HISTORY_WIDTH 25 -> 40 (now percent of TerminalContainer inner area). useHistoryPaneState now broadcasts a CustomEvent so two hook instances (WorktreeDetailRefactored for toggleHistoryPane, TerminalContainer for visible/width render) stay in sync after toggles. All lint/tsc/unit tests/build PASS.

unit.notes: All 352 unit test files pass. Includes new Tooltip (13) + TerminalContainer (11) + updated ActivityBar (16) / WorktreeDesktopLayout (10) / WorktreeDetailRefactored (41) / cli-tab-switching (2) tests.

integration.notes: All 39 integration failures are PRE-EXISTING and unrelated to Issue #730 (api-clone / api-hooks / tmux / Claude session integration). Verified by stashing all #730 changes and re-running api-clone tests, which still fail. The issue-266-acceptance test that I updated passes (7/7).

issues_encountered: useHistoryPaneState single-instance assumption: two consumers (WorktreeDetailRefactored for toggleHistoryPane, TerminalContainer for visible/width) would otherwise desync after a toggle because same-window localStorage writes don't fire the storage event. Resolved by adding a window-level CustomEvent broadcaster in the hook so both consumers stay in sync. This is also covered by the existing useHistoryPaneState.test.ts (7 tests still pass).

Pre-existing integration test failures (39 across api-clone / api-hooks / api-kill-session / api-messages / api-prompt-handling / api-respond / api-worktrees / current-output / trust-dialog) are unrelated to Issue #730 layout changes. Verified by stashing all #730 changes and re-running.
next_action: Proceed to Phase 4 (documentation updates: CLAUDE.md, docs/UI_UX_GUIDE.md, CHANGELOG.md) and Phase 5 (PR creation). Pre-existing integration failures are out of scope.
commits: 6b14f4c6: feat(layout): ActivityBar full-height + custom tooltip + History inside Terminal container (#730)
